name: multi-model-debate
description: Compare perspectives from multiple AI models on a creative concept

models.instruction: Provide a logical, structured analysis of the creative concept. Focus on underlying patterns, potential applications, and systematic implications.
Provide a balanced analysis that combines creative insight with practical considerations. Explore both imaginative possibilities and realistic constraints.
Provide an unconventional, outside-the-box analysis. Challenge assumptions, explore radical possibilities, and consider unexpected implications.
